non_derivative_transactions.security_title: Direc. Deferred Comp. Plan - BOHC Fund
security_title_fn: Investment election by reporting person to acquire stock under the Directors' Deferred Compensation Plan at a price equal to the price of derivative security set forth in column 8 (1 for 1).

derivative_holdings.security_title: Direc. Deferred Comp. Plan - BOHC Fund
security_title_fn: Investment election by reporting person to acquire Bank of Hawaii Corporation stock under the Directors' Deferred Compensation Plan. Distributions to be made at termination of service as a director or earlier at director's option.

footnotes.1: Investment election by reporting person to acquire stock under the Directors' Deferred Compensation Plan at a price equal to the price of derivative security set forth in column 8 (1 for 1).
footnotes.2: Investment election by reporting person to acquire Bank of Hawaii Corporation stock under the Directors' Deferred Compensation Plan. Distributions to be made at termination of service as a director or earlier at director's option.
footnotes.3: Securities reported were acquired with reinvested dividends pursuant to Bank of Hawaii Corporation's Dividend Reinvestment and Stock Purchase Plan.
